nasb.text: The high priest Ananias commanded those standing beside him to strike him on the mouth.

esv.text: And the high priest Ananias commanded those who stood by him to strike him on the mouth.

cnv.text: 大祭司亞拿尼亞就吩咐站在他旁邊的人打保羅的嘴巴。

ccb.text: 大祭司亚拿尼亚一听，就命那些站在旁边的人打保罗的嘴。

csbs.text: 大祭司阿纳尼亚就命令站在保罗旁边的人，打他的嘴巴。
